name: Load Image
description: Load an image from a file path

name: Load Folder
description: Load all images from a folder (batch processing)

name: Save Image
description: Save an image to a directory with customizable filename and format

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Output format: png, jpg, webp, bmp, tiff

parameters.name: quality
parameters.description: Quality for lossy formats like JPEG/WebP (1-100)

parameters.name: create_dirs
parameters.description: Create output directory if it doesn't exist

name: Batch Save Images
description: Save multiple images to a directory with auto-incrementing filenames

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Output format: png, jpg, webp, bmp, tiff

parameters.name: quality
parameters.description: Quality for lossy formats like JPEG/WebP (1-100)

parameters.name: create_dirs
parameters.description: Create output directory if it doesn't exist

name: Gaussian Blur
description: Apply a Gaussian blur effect to an image (GPU accelerated when available)

name: Box Blur
description: Apply a fast box blur effect to an image

name: Brightness
description: Adjust the brightness of an image

name: Contrast
description: Adjust the contrast of an image

name: Saturation
description: Adjust the color saturation of an image

name: Grayscale
description: Convert an image to grayscale (GPU accelerated when available)

name: Invert Colors
description: Invert the colors of an image (GPU accelerated when available)

name: Resize
description: Resize an image to specified dimensions

parameters.name: preserve_aspect
parameters.description: Preserve aspect ratio (uses width as primary)

name: Rotate
description: Rotate an image by a specified angle

name: Flip
description: Flip an image horizontally or vertically

name: Crop
description: Crop a region from an image

name: Blend
description: Blend two images together using various blend modes

name: Overlay
description: Place one image on top of another at a specific position

name: Passthrough
description: Passes the input through unchanged

name: Preview
description: Preview an image and display its information

name: Split Channels
description: Split an image into its Red, Green, Blue, and Alpha channels

name: Merge Channels
description: Merge separate Red, Green, Blue, and Alpha channels into one image

name: Note
description: Add a note or comment to document your graph

name: Image Info
description: Get detailed information about an image

name: Image Preview
description: Display a preview thumbnail of an image in the node graph

name: Collect Images
description: Collect multiple images into an array for batch processing

name: Get Image From Array
description: Extract a single image from an array by index

name: Array Length
description: Get the number of items in an array

name: Value Display
description: Display any value type (numbers, booleans, strings) for debugging

name: Integer
description: Provides a constant integer value

name: Float
description: Provides a constant floating point value

name: String
description: Provides a constant string value

name: Boolean
description: Provides a constant boolean value

name: Color
description: Provides a constant color value

name: Add
description: Add two numbers (a + b)

name: Subtract
description: Subtract two numbers (a - b)

name: Multiply
description: Multiply two numbers (a × b)

name: Divide
description: Divide two numbers (a ÷ b)

name: Modulo
description: Modulo operation (a % b)

name: Power
description: Raise a to the power of b (a^b)

name: Min
description: Return the minimum of two numbers

name: Max
description: Return the maximum of two numbers

name: Clamp
description: Clamp a value between min and max

name: Equal
description: Check if two numbers are equal (a == b)

name: Not Equal
description: Check if two numbers are not equal (a != b)

name: Less Than
description: Check if a is less than b (a < b)

name: Less Than or Equal
description: Check if a is less than or equal to b (a <= b)

name: Greater Than
description: Check if a is greater than b (a > b)

name: Greater Than or Equal
description: Check if a is greater than or equal to b (a >= b)

name: And
description: Logical AND operation (a && b)

name: Or
description: Logical OR operation (a || b)

name: Not
description: Logical NOT operation (!a)

name: Xor
description: Logical XOR operation (a ^ b)

name: To Integer
description: Convert a value to an integer

name: To Float
description: Convert a value to a floating-point number

name: To String
description: Convert a value to a string

name: To Boolean
description: Convert a value to a boolean

name: Image Stack
description: Stack multiple images to reduce noise and increase signal-to-noise ratio

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Stacking method: mean, median, sigma_clip, max, min

parameters.name: sigma
parameters.description: Sigma value for sigma clipping (only used with sigma_clip method)

name: Dark Frame Subtract
description: Subtract dark frame to remove thermal noise from astrophotos

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Scale factor for dark frame subtraction

name: Flat Field Correct
description: Apply flat field correction to remove vignetting and dust artifacts

parameters.name: normalize
parameters.description: Normalize flat field to mean value

name: Hot Pixel Removal
description: Detect and remove hot/dead pixels using median filtering

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Deviation threshold to detect hot pixels

name: Histogram Stretch
description: Stretch histogram to enhance faint details in astrophotos

name: Batch Brightness
description: Adjust brightness for single image or batch of images

name: Batch Resize
description: Resize single image or batch of images

name: Batch Contrast
description: Adjust contrast for single image or batch of images

name: Batch Gaussian Blur
description: Apply Gaussian blur to single image or batch of images

name: Batch Saturation
description: Adjust saturation for single image or batch of images

name: Batch Rotate
description: Rotate single image or batch of images

name: Batch Grayscale
description: Convert single image or batch of images to grayscale

name: Batch Invert
description: Invert colors of single image or batch of images

name: Batch Crop
description: Crop single image or batch of images

name: Batch Flip
description: Flip single image or batch of images

name: Array Map
description: Apply an operation to each image in an array (parallel processing)

name: Array Filter
description: Filter images in an array based on size/properties

name: Array Concat
description: Concatenate multiple arrays or images into one array

name: Array Slice
description: Extract a range of images from an array
